title: Department Manager Vacancy at Starbucks India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Starbucks India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Starbucks India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Starbucks India:
Starbucks India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
